question: What are the names of all the authors, and how many books has each written?
sql: SELECT Author.Name, COUNT(Book.ISBN) FROM Author JOIN Author_Book ON Author.idAuthor = Author_Book.Author JOIN Book ON Author_Book.ISBN = Book.ISBN GROUP BY Author.Name;

back_translation.intent: 统计每个作者的书籍数量

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题询问所有作者及其各自撰写的书籍数量，SQL反向翻译描述准确反映了这一意图，涉及的表、列、聚合和分组也与问题匹配。
